semantic.role: Central language registry mapping project source languages (e.g., TypeScript, Python) to @ast-grep/napi Lang objects. Supports both static built-in languages and dynamically loaded plugin languages via registerDynamicLanguage.
responsibilities: Maintain a registry of LangConfig entries that associate source language identifiers (SourceLanguage) with corresponding @ast-grep/napi Lang objects and optional dynamic loaders.
Provide lookup methods for retrieving the correct Lang object given a file path or SourceLanguage, enabling AST extraction for scanning and analysis.
Manage dynamic language registration (e.g., for plugins) by ensuring idempotent calls to registerDynamicLanguage and caching the promise to avoid concurrent re-registration.
Expose configuration interfaces (LangConfig, InternalLangConfig) for defining language support in the system's language rules and scanner configuration.
outOfScope: AST extraction or traversal – this module only provides the Lang object, not the extraction logic.
Definition of per-language parsing rules or semantic analysis – those reside in separate rule files.
File system scanning, Git diff parsing, or any I/O operations beyond importing language packages.
Loading or validation of language-specific rule sets (e.g., naming conventions).
invariants: For a given SourceLanguage, getLanguage() always returns the same Lang instance within a process lifetime.
Dynamic language registration is performed at most once; subsequent calls return the cached promise without re-registering.
All registered LangConfigs have a unique langKey and sourceLanguage to avoid conflicts.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a lightweight, extensible language registry that decouples language support definitions from scanning and analysis engines. New languages can be added via configuration and dynamic imports without modifying core scanner code.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: The recent commit (refactor: remove legacy CLI aliases, rebuild docs, fix schema and tests) does not directly modify this file's contract. Any changes to lang-registry.ts were likely refactoring for consistency with the updated CLI and schema, not a change in role.

publicSurface.description: Singleton-style class that manages the mapping from SourceLanguage to @ast-grep/napi Lang objects. Provides static methods for language resolution and dynamic registration. Consumed by the scanner, AST extractor, and any component that needs to obtain a Lang instance for a given source file.

Interface defining the configuration for a single language entry: ruleName (written name), langKey (the Lang or string identifier), sourceLanguage (canonical SourceLanguage enum), and an optional loader function for dynamic imports. Used when populating the registry with built-in or plugin languages.

Extends LangConfig with an optional packageName field used internally to track the npm package that provides dynamic language support. Exported for type consistency across the language registration system.
